purpose: Own pass-local contracts, immutable fallbacks, and shader binding layouts for the Lines renderer.
invariants: WGSL and GLSL resource contract names stay unchanged.
Shader files remain import-path stable unless deliberately moved with neutral import aliases.
Pass helpers are constants or type-only contracts and do not add per-frame allocation.
change_protocols: Changing a uniform payload type requires checking the matching WGSL/GLSL declaration and binding setup.
Changing a binding layout requires checking the matching shader resource declarations.
